collection.title: Brian & Co Stewardship Intelligence Collection
collection.description: A premium Brian & Co product family for dynamic update intelligence, compatibility stewardship, Continuum Vault logging, Guardian device care, dependency monitoring, approval-aware automation, and human-friendly change explanations.
collection.visualDirection: Black/deep charcoal, champagne metallic gold, refined dashboard/vault motifs, no crowns.

products.title: Dynamic Steward AI+
products.subtitle: Adaptive Platform Stewardship Enhancement

pricing.essentialMemberAccess: Basic current-version and security advisory summaries
pricing.upgradeRule: la carte buyers keep purchased features permanently; new premium modules are shown as optional paid upgrades.

includedCore: Update explanations in Brian & Co tone

products.title: Dependency Stewardship AI+
products.subtitle: Website, App & Package Currency Intelligence
products.description: Keeps supported website/app dependencies current through official channels, avoids unsafe force downgrades, tests in sandbox, and explains the change clearly before approval or automatic application.

products.title: Device Stewardship AI+
products.subtitle: Manufacturer-Verified Device Update Intelligence
products.description: Guides signed driver, manufacturer/OEM update, restart-readiness, and device-health checks through official sources only.

products.title: Update Steward
products.subtitle: Human-Friendly Change Intelligence
products.description: Explains what changed, who provided it, why it matters, whether a restart is required, and what the user should do next.

products.title: Continuum Vault Plus
products.subtitle: Extended Preservation & Change History
products.description: Adds extended retention, advanced search, historical comparison, manifest tracking, and richer Trust Ledger history.
